glm-copilot.walkthrough.title: GLM for Copilot Chat
glm-copilot.walkthrough.description: Set up GLM models in Copilot Chat.
glm-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.title: Set your GLM API key
glm-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.descri:
[Get an API key](command:glm-copilot.getApiKey) from bigmodel.cn.
[Set API Key](command:glm-copilot.setApiKey)
glm-copilot.walkthrough.showModels.title: Show GLM models
glm-copilot.walkthrough.showModels.descr:
If the models are hidden, open VS Code's Language Models manager and show the GLM models.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
glm-copilot.walkthrough.advancedSettings:
Customize providers and model names, configure the vision proxy, enable experimental settings, and more in the extension settings.
[Open settings](command:glm-copilot.openSettings)
glm-copilot.config.title: GLM Copilot
glm-copilot.config.baseUrl.description: Optional GLM API base URL override. When non-empty, this value has the highest priority and overrides the `endpoint` preset. Leave empty to use the selected `endpoint` preset. Default resolved endpoint is the domestic GLM Coding Plan: `https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/coding/paas/v4`.
glm-copilot.config.endpoint.description: Single-value GLM endpoint selector. Each option uniquely resolves to a base URL and wire protocol (OpenAI `/chat/completions` or Anthropic `/v1/messages`). Replaces the older `region` + `apiMode` + `apiProtocol` trio. A non-empty `baseUrl` still overrides this preset.
Domestic BigModel Coding Plan via OpenAI `/chat/completions` at `https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/coding/paas/v4`. Default.
glm-copilot.config.endpoint.chinaStandar: Domestic BigModel pay-as-you-go API via OpenAI `/chat/completions` at `https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4`.
glm-copilot.config.endpoint.chinaAnthrop: Domestic BigModel Coding Plan via Anthropic `/v1/messages` at `https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/anthropic`. May bypass stricter rate limits on certain models.
glm-copilot.config.endpoint.internationa: International Z.ai Coding Plan via OpenAI `/chat/completions` at `https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4`.
International Z.ai pay-as-you-go API via OpenAI `/chat/completions` at `https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4`.
International Z.ai Coding Plan via Anthropic `/v1/messages` at `https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic`.
glm-copilot.config.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens per request. Set to 0 to use the API default. Useful for controlling costs.
glm-copilot.config.experimental.stabiliz:
**Experimental**: improve GLM context-cache hit rate by pre-activating available tools.
- When the enabled tools list changes across turns, this may improve GLM context-cache hit rate.
- Requests will include more function definitions, so input tokens may increase. Cache-hit input tokens are billed at a lower price, but still count toward usage.
- This may add internal preflight tool calls to the current Copilot chat history. If you switch to another model in the same conversation, that model provider may reject or mishandle the replayed history. Start a new chat if model switching behaves unexpectedly.

Use [Configure Tools](command:workbench.action.chat.configureTools) to **view and manage** your tool list:

- 64 or fewer enabled tools: usually no need to enable this unless the tool list still changes across turns.
- More than 128 enabled tools: not recommended. GLM supports at most 128 functions in one `tools` request. Consider disabling tools you rarely use.
glm-copilot.config.debugMode.description:
Controls what diagnostic information GLM Copilot writes. Token usage is always reported to Copilot when the API returns it.

- **Minimal** - Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or request dumps.
- **Metadata** - Privacy-safe diagnostic metadata (request hashes, prefix overlap, tool schema changes). Does not contain prompt text. View with [`GLM: Show Logs`](command:glm-copilot.showLogs).
- **Verbose** - Complete request payloads written to disk for local debugging. **Warning: contains sensitive prompt content.** View with [`GLM: Open Request Dumps Folder`](command:glm-copilot.openRequestDumpsFolder).
glm-copilot.config.debugMode.minimal.des: Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or dumps.
glm-copilot.config.debugMode.metadata.de: Privacy-safe metadata. Safe to share publicly. View with `GLM: Show Logs`.
glm-copilot.config.debugMode.verbose.des: Contains sensitive prompt content. For local debugging only.
glm-copilot.config.modelIdOverrides.desc: Override the API model ID sent for any built-in or custom GLM model. Defaults are prefilled with official GLM IDs; add custom model keys only when the endpoint expects a different API model name.
glm-copilot.config.modelIdOverrides.glm-: API model ID for GLM-4.6V-Flash, also used by automatic vision proxy mode.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.descript: Additional GLM-compatible models shown in the Copilot model picker. Use either a string model ID or an object with `id`, optional display `name`, token limits, `toolCalling`, and `thinking`. `contextWindowTokens` represents a shared prompt + completion window and takes precedence over `maxInputTokens` when valid. Custom model IDs override built-in IDs in the picker and lookup. Image attachments are still converted through the existing Vision Proxy; custom models do not bypass the proxy or use native vision.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.string.d: Custom model ID. Defaults are applied for name, token limits, tool calling, thinking, and Vision Proxy image support.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.id.descr: Model ID shown in VS Code and used for requests unless `modelIdOverrides` maps it to another API model ID.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.name.des: Display name. Defaults to the model ID.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.contextW: Shared prompt + completion context window. Must be greater than maxOutputTokens; when valid, maxInputTokens is derived from it.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.maxInput: Maximum input tokens shown to Copilot. Defaults to 200000.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.maxOutpu: Maximum output tokens shown to Copilot. Defaults to 131072.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.toolCall: Whether this custom model supports tool calling. Defaults to true.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.thinking: Whether this custom model supports thinking mode. Defaults to true.
glm-copilot.config.visionModel.descripti: Compatibility setting managed by [Configure Vision Proxy](command:glm-copilot.setVisionModel). Stores the selected VS Code vision model as `vendor/id` when that source is active. In automatic mode, GLM-4.6V-Flash is tried first and this VS Code model is used as fallback. Legacy bare model IDs are read for compatibility.
glm-copilot.config.visionPrompt.descript:
Prompt sent to the vision proxy model when describing image attachments before forwarding them to GLM.

[Configure Vision Proxy](command:glm-copilot.setVisionModel)
